params.name: BetaGo
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Evolution Chest (1.5%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Sep 6, 2017, BetaGo became the first robot to defeat the human Go champion. 

BetaGo is a program that uses the artificial neural network and algorithms to collect a large number of matrix numbers and takes weights through a nonlinear activation method to generate a set of data. Through a number of matrices, multiple layers of the organization are linked together to form a neural network, which can be used for precise and complex processing. With such complex algorithms, it has become the top …
